title: dde: Poop Mod
description: Adds poop blocks, armor, items and more.
body:
# dde: Poop Mod

This mod adds all things poop, it adds blocks, armor, fart potions and more poop-related stuff! Meant to be used as a simple but fun extra mod that you can use together with other mods.

## Recipes

### Crafting Table
- One dirt of any kind -> One poop piece.
- Four poop pieces in a square -> Two poop blocks.
- Use poop pieces for poop armor, smooth poop blocks and poop bricks.

### Brewing Stand
- One block poop + Water Bottle = Potion of Fart I (03:00)
- One block poop + Potion of Fart I (03:00) = Potion of Fart II (03:10)

![Poop blocks, poop items, poop armor.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/503f2301bfb57691fda80f51bd542c8fdee8881d.jpeg)

_"Poop" Emoji graphics by Twemoji, licensed under CC-BY 4.0._
